title: Conversation sorting
excerpt:

posts.author: MarkN (Mark Nuara)
posts.cookedHtml:
The new updates show at the top when you go into the conversation button. But if someone reply’s to a previous update that can get lost because it does not pull up to the top to show you the most recent comment.

Could we get an option to sort updates in the conversation section by date posted or so that whatever was the last thing posted would automatically show up on top and be the first thing you see?
